Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3

Class FlixelLwjgl3HostIntegration

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3HostIntegration
All Implemented Interfaces:
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.host.FlixelHostIntegration
public final class FlixelLwjgl3HostIntegration extends Object implements me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.host.FlixelHostIntegration
Desktop FlixelHostIntegration: freedesktop or Zenity notifications on Linux, osascript on macOS, WinRT toasts via PowerShell on Windows, GLFW window attention, and AWT Taskbar attention where available.
